description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features a combination of white and neutral-toned exterior walls, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a central courtyard and a pool area. The front approach is defined by a long, straight pathway leading to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped greenery. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious patio adjacent to a rectangular swimming pool, with glass doors providing seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The side elevations reveal additional windows and access points, as well as integrated garage and utility spaces. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, natural light, and a strong connection to outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and integrated outdoor spaces including a pool and courtyard. The design features clean lines, white walls, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, straight pathway, and landscaped approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and green space along the boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, large glass doors, and rectangular swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible secondary entrances, utility areas, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
